title: Close out epic zt6: run retro, then flesh out next feasible epic (vdl)
description: Run the epic-close retro (harvest learnings → tiers, compact .tick/learnings.md, drift review, retro report). Then pick the next feasible epic in soft order — vdl (Recursive orchestration) — read its rough scope, partition into child ticks, and continue with tk graph vdl. See references/agent-runner.md.
notes: 2026-06-20 14:34 - Close-out progress: retro DONE + learnings promoted + .tick committed. REMAINING: flesh out epic vdl + continue. PAUSED at epic boundary for a user checkpoint before launching the next epic (vdl is ungated and would otherwise auto-continue).
